scope.summary: C6 de-monolith: isomorphic extraction of the CLI surface (clap derive types) from main.rs into cli.rs, and systemd unit-file helpers from service_lifecycle.rs into service_lifecycle/service_units.rs. No flag, subcommand, help text, or exit code changed; main.rs re-exports via pub(crate) use cli::* so every existing reference resolves exactly as before. Ratchet updated downward for service_lifecycle.rs and adjusted for the new seam files.
out_of_scope: The dispatch/ split (separate C6 bead; dispatch/mod.rs and dispatch/tool_routing.rs are another agent's in-flight work).
Any change to command behaviour, flags, subcommands, help text, or exit codes (isomorphic only).
The pre-existing golden_behavior and dispatch test failures on HEAD (caused by the A1a fail-closed catalog gate fa93e169, not this extraction).

entry_points.name: CLI command-surface isomorphism (C9 snippet-truth + P2-6 help text)
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp --test cli: 27 passed, 0 failed. Includes setup_generated_client_snippet_launches_serve_as_written (C9: printed onboarding snippets work VERBATIM) and the P2-6 help-text assertions (om serve/doctor/capabilities usage, exit code 2, no 'Usage: oraclemcp'). No test was edited — if the split had changed behaviour these would fail.

entry_points.name: CLI-vs-running-server contract
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp --test c6_cli_vs_running_server: 2 passed, 0 failed (store-collision naming + state-mutating verbs fail while store owned).

entry_points.name: Crate compiles after extraction
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp: Finished dev profile, exit 0. The clap Parser/Subcommand/Args/ValueEnum derives moved byte-for-byte to cli.rs; main.rs adds only `mod cli;`, `pub(crate) use cli::*;`, and a #[cfg(test)] `use clap::Parser;` so main_tests.rs resolves exactly as before.

entry_points.name: Max-file-size ratchet
entry_points.trace: scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh: my in-scope files pass (main.rs 7249, cli.rs 502, service_lifecycle.rs 5448 downward from 5538, service_units.rs 97). The one remaining violation (dispatch/tests.rs 15703) is another agent's in-flight C6 dispatch work, out of this bead's scope.

limitations: main.rs grew by 7 lines (7242->7249) for the module glue (mod cli; re-export; cfg(test) Parser import); the ratchet was raised to match in the same reviewed split commit, per the bead's instruction. The net campaign effect is still a large reduction in main.rs responsibility (the 502-line CLI surface is now a separate seam).

The pre-existing golden_behavior (3) and dispatch (65) test failures on HEAD are caused by the A1a fail-closed catalog gate (fa93e169), verified unrelated to this extraction: the extraction moved code between files without changing any logic, and the failing tests live in clean committed files (dispatch/tests.rs, golden fixtures) that this commit did not touch.
